# Cloud Run deploy trigger

Update this file only when intentionally triggering the Deploy to Cloud Run workflow from an external agent.

Last requested: 2026-06-17T08:05:00Z
Requested by: ChatGPT AWS cost inventory advisor
Purpose: Trigger Deploy to Cloud Run after merging PR #7 S3 bucket size MCP action.
Target merge commit: 9ed9efe263c3875ccd3ebfeaa0305a4c524d9bb8
Previous workflow fix commit: 77c51256de0346b7dcc76e3168b9bf1e29a66774
Requested action: start a new Deploy to Cloud Run run from current main
